description: Over 350 GB+ of data was compromised, including data dumps of mail servers, databases, confidential documents, contracts, and much more sensitive material.

post_title: A A Al Moosa Enterprises (ARENCO Group)
description: A.A. Al Moosa Enterprises, also known as ARENCO Group, is a diversified conglomerate based in Dubai, with interests spanning architectural and engineering consulting, real estate, hospitality, car rentals, manufacturing, and interior design. Established in 1971, the group has grown into one of the top family-owned business groups in Dubai, focusing on quality, service, and innovation.
